recommendations.title: Whatcha Wearin'?
recommendations.overview: Yoon-jung accidentally calls a stranger, instead of her boyfriend, and has phone sex with the unknown man. When Yoon-jung's relationship with her boyfriend turns sour, Yoon-jung meets Hyun-seung, the stranger she had phone sex with.

recommendations.title: The Priests
recommendations.overview: To save a girl in danger, a priest and deacon jump into a mysterious case.

recommendations.title: A Violent Prosecutor
recommendations.overview: After a prosecution lawyer is framed and convicted for murder, he tries to catch the real murderer from jail with the help of a con artist.

recommendations.title: It Follows
recommendations.overview: A young woman is followed by an unknown supernatural force after a sexual encounter.

recommendations.title: Eloise
recommendations.overview: Four friends break into an abandoned insane asylum in search of a death certificate which will grant one of them a large inheritance. However, finding it soon becomes the least of their worries in a place haunted by dark memories.

recommendations.title: The Call
recommendations.overview: Connected by phone in the same home but 20 years apart, a caller puts a woman’s past — and life — on the line to change her own fate.

recommendations.title: Late Night with the Devil
recommendations.overview: A live broadcast of a late-night talk show in 1977 goes horribly wrong, unleashing evil into the nation's living rooms.

recommendations.title: Exhuma
recommendations.overview: After tracing the origin of a disturbing supernatural affliction to a wealthy family's ancestral gravesite, a team of paranormal experts relocates the remains—and soon discovers what happens to those who dare to mess with the wrong grave.

recommendations.title: Decision to Leave
recommendations.overview: From a mountain peak in South Korea, a man plummets to his death. Did he jump, or was he pushed? When detective Hae-joon arrives on the scene, he begins to suspect the dead man’s wife Seo-rae. But as he digs deeper into the investigation, he finds hi

recommendations.title: The House at the End of Time
recommendations.overview: The story of Dulce, a mother who has encounters with apparitions inside her old house. She must decipher a mystery that could trigger a prophecy: the death of her family.
